rules: descriptor defines declared capability, not blanket authority
high externality capability should declare compensation and unrecoverable side-effect semantics
workflow asset may describe how to act but does not grant permission to act
commit behavior must be explicit, never hidden in workflow internals
external memory enters as candidate retrieval input, not authoritative fact
memory lacking source, scope, or freshness must remain low-trust
external agent output is candidate state input, not authoritative truth
plain prose without evidence or structure must not enter high-trust coordination

trust_ceiling: external capability result may become candidate evidence
external workflow may become candidate procedure
external memory may become candidate fact or retrieval input
external agent may become candidate plan, candidate state update, or candidate capsule
no external source may directly create verified fact, completed task, or trusted procedure
